# terrible_community_general_keycloak_authentication (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `alias` (String) Alias for the authentication flow.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `realm` (String) The name of the realm in which is the authentication.

### Optional

- `authenticationExecutions` (String) Configuration structure for the executions.
- `copyFrom` (String) `flowAlias` of the authentication flow to use for the copy.
- `description` (String) Description of the flow.
- `force` (Boolean) If `true`, allows to remove the authentication flow and recreate it.
- `providerId` (String) `providerId` for the new flow when not copied from an existing flow.
- `state` (String) Control if the authentication flow must exists or not.

### Read-Only

- `end_state` (String) Representation of the authentication after module execution.
- `msg` (String) Message as to what action was taken.
